title: CocoLng/RealmAI-Engine

title: denn-gubsky/loomcycle
summary: The runtime substrate for agentic systems — one Go binary, six LLM providers, MCP-native, configurable as a managed sandbox or full agentic dev environment. Where agents live, talk, and learn.

title: pavanbadempet/AI-Healthcare-System
summary: Privacy-first AI Healthcare platform for HIPAA-compliant clinical workflows. Features a stateful LangGraph & MAF multi-agent RAG system, local Ollama LLMs, FastAPI, and React. Integrates PySpark Medallion Lakehouse analytics, HAPI FHIR patient imports, medical diagnostics ML models, and secure EHR hospital operations.

title: vroomfondel/dgxarley
summary: Ansible playbooks for a 4-node K3s cluster with NVIDIA DGX Spark nodes for distributed LLM inference

title: zi3lak/cssltd_code
summary: CSSLTD Code — internal AI coding agent for CSSLTD engineers: a terminal (TUI) agent + HTTP server that reads and edits code, runs commands, and drives full engineering tasks. Works with paid APIs (Anthropic, OpenAI, and ~30 other providers) or fully locally via Ollama, with zero telemetry by default.

title: lidge-jun/opencodex

title: Tencent/WeKnora
summary: Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

title: xopcai/xopc
summary: Local-first AI assistant for long-running goals, automations, workflows, and multi-surface chat.

title: patil-shubham-dev/AgenticOS
summary: An open-source, self-hostable AI operating system and development workspace. Powered by Electron and React 19, it features multi-agent orchestration, full Model Context Protocol (MCP) support, native filesystem access, and an extensible tool ecosystem for autonomous software development.

title: Bike4Mind/bike4mind
summary: The open-core AI workbench — notebooks, agents, RAG, voice, and images across any model: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, or local via Ollama/vLLM. BSL 1.1,  auto-converting to Apache-2.0 on a two-year clock. Your AI keeps running when theirs doesn't.

title: kido-luci/local-llm-server
summary: Local LLM code assistant + OpenAI-compatible Ollama API server for Windows (14B coding models on a 12GB GPU)

title: Parikshit-Dogra/CodeExplain
summary: An AI-powered interactive coding tutor built with Streamlit. Provides beginner-friendly, structured code explanations (line-by-line, complexity analysis, and quiz generation) using Gemini, Ollama, or LM Studio.

title: Muaviatanveer/NeuroSyn-Copilot
summary: 🤖 One AI Employee. Every Office Task Automated. A premium full-stack AI Copilot that ingests local files, coordinates neural worker handoffs, evaluates company metrics, and compiles production-ready PDF, Word, PowerPoint, and ZIP deliverables locally. Mapped by NeuroScore™.

title: FlokeStudio/glyph-miO

title: FlokeStudio/glyph-s
summary: Glyph Search 2.7 - universal offline-first full-text search engine with ranking profiles, extended query grammar, CJS/ESM bundles. Powers Obsidian plugins and web apps. GPL-3.0.

title: CorvinLabs/CorvinOS
summary: Self-hosted agentic OS — connects Claude Code, Codex or Hermes Agent to Discord, Telegram, WhatsApp, Slack & Email. EU AI Act 2026 & GDPR compliance by architecture.

title: dcostenco/prism-coder
summary: Persistent memory + local AI for coding agents. 2B–27B open-weight LLM fleet, cross-session Mind Palace, cognitive routing, L3 grounding verifier, multi-agent Hivemind. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code. Offline-first, HIPAA-ready. Free tier included.
